headline: Teladoc (TDOC) Up 23.9% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Teladoc (TDOC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is Danaher Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Danaher has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, but analysts are highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
